label: Subsoil pH (30-100 cm)
comment: Deferred: pilot uses topsoil 0-30 cm only via the topsoil canonical (soil_ph / soil_organic_carbon). Per v0.2.5 worked example, depth-stratified pairs are option (b) for a future v0.3.x schema increment; re-authored when subsoil binding becomes operationally needed.

label: Subsoil organic carbon (30-100 cm)
comment: Deferred: pilot uses topsoil 0-30 cm only via the topsoil canonical (soil_ph / soil_organic_carbon). Per v0.2.5 worked example, depth-stratified pairs are option (b) for a future v0.3.x schema increment; re-authored when subsoil binding becomes operationally needed.

label: Soil texture (USDA class)
comment: Canonical USDA-class soil texture. Complementary to soil_texture_hsg (HSG hydrology classification) — not a duplicate. Both stay canonical.

label: Built-up areas (points/polygons)
comment: Could be merged with population_exposure_rural or treated as proximity variable.

label: Water-quality nitrate violation probability
comment: Could be modelled as priority_need (T5) instead of structural_suitability (T4) — water quality is an opportunity-space concern, not a tree-growth constraint.

label: Frost-free period (days)
comment: Temperate-zone climate constraint. Distinct from mean_annual_temperature.

label: Set-aside conservation program coverage
comment: US-specific (NASS county-level). Decide: drop, generalise (e.g. 'protected/conservation land coverage'), or keep as country-binding variable.

label: Rotational grazing prevalence
comment: Silvopasture-specific (F3 family). Likely not relevant to F1 silvoarable — flag for family-routing decision.

label: Rented agricultural land share
comment: Tenure proxy. Could merge with a generic 'tenure security' canonical.

label: Geological substrate (lithology)
comment: Mendonça (Embrapa-style) ranked classes; may be redundant with soil_texture in coarse-resolution analyses.

label: Forest fragment size (ha)
comment: Derived from forest cover layer + patch analysis; agroforestry-priority signal (Brazilian Atlantic Forest restoration framing).

label: Flood hazard (return-period flood depth/extent)
comment: Layer choice deferred — FATHOM, JRC, WRI Aqueduct. Pilot-time decision.

label: Biodiversity priority (layer TBD)
comment: BII (Newbold et al. 2016) chosen as canonical layer. KBA polygons recommended as supplementary binary flag (vector overlay outside T5).

label: Production gap vs attainable productivity
comment: Per-farming-system metric resolved via BIND: yield-gap (GAEZ/MapSPAM) for cropping; NPP gap for rangeland; mixed where applicable. Livestock side often requires_upload.

label: Gender inequity index (national flag)
comment: National-flag layer for now. Subnational disaggregation requires_upload.

label: Market access (travel time to large markets)
comment: Nelson/Weiss accessibility surface. Distinct from distance_to_road (proxy).

label: Mean farm size (smallholder share or median ha)
Agricultural production value (gridded)
comment: Generic MapSPAM-style value layer. Cocoa-specific binding already in T1; this canonical is the multi-crop generalisation.

label: Travel time to large city/market
comment: Nelson/Weiss accessibility surface — minutes to large town. Maps to WOCAT QM indirect driver 'm' (market access / roads).

label: Electrification / night-lights index
comment: VIIRS night-lights or WB Energy grid-coverage. Maps to WOCAT QM indirect driver 'i' (infrastructure / energy).

label: Land tenure security (formal + customary, incl. IPLC)
comment: LandMark + WWF/ICCA + Prindex. Carries FPIC/ESS7 flag where IPLC overlap detected. Maps to WOCAT QM indirect driver 't' (land tenure).

label: Conflict / fragility index
comment: ACLED event density + WB FCV list. Maps to WOCAT QM indirect driver 'p' (political stability / conflict).

label: Extension service + governance quality
comment: WB WGI + country-team uploads. Maps to WOCAT QM indirect drivers 'e' (extension / education) and 'g' (governance / policy).

label: Rural finance / credit / project density
comment: WB project-funding density + FinScope. Maps to WOCAT QM indirect driver 'f' (finance / credit).

label: Market / value-chain depth
comment: FAOSTAT + country-team uploads. Maps to WOCAT QM indirect driver 'm' (market access / value chain depth).

label: Seasonal rural labour availability
comment: ILO + LSMS-ISA. Maps to WOCAT QM indirect driver 'l' (labor availability).

label: Farming system (EO-derived 6-class)
comment: Derived layer — recipe in methodology/farming_system_classifier.md. Run-time output, not a single dataset.

label: IPLC lands presence
comment: LandMark + WWF/ICCA. Higher presence -> equity priority + FPIC/ESS7 flag for M6 hand-off.

label: Establishment cost
comment: Initial establishment / capital cost per hectare. Extracted from literature/WOCAT database.

label: Recurrent / maintenance cost
comment: Annual maintenance / recurrent operational cost per hectare. Extracted from literature/WOCAT database.

label: Wind / cyclone hazard (max wind speed / gust speed)
Carbon sequestration / removal rate (biomass + soil)
comment: auto-registered from T3/T6 re-extraction; needs ontology review

label: Project / investment cost
comment: auto-registered from T3/T6 re-extraction; needs ontology review

label: Economic return (EIRR / NPV / benefit-cost)
comment: auto-registered from T3/T6 re-extraction; needs ontology review

label: Beneficiaries reached / area under practice
comment: auto-registered from T3/T6 re-extraction; needs ontology review

label: Household income / revenue effect
comment: auto-registered from T3/T6 re-extraction; needs ontology review

label: Food security / dietary diversity outcome
comment: auto-registered from T3/T6 re-extraction; needs ontology review

label: Adoption / uptake rate
comment: auto-registered from T3/T6 re-extraction; needs ontology review

label: Ecosystem service provision (non-carbon)
comment: auto-registered from T3/T6 re-extraction; needs ontology review

label: Biodiversity outcome (richness / ESI)
comment: auto-registered from T3/T6 re-extraction; needs ontology review

label: Soil erosion / land degradation hazard
comment: auto-registered from T3/T6 re-extraction; needs ontology review

label: Climate shock / variability exposure
comment: auto-registered from T3/T6 re-extraction; needs ontology review

label: Windbreak / shelter protection effect
comment: auto-registered from T3/T6 re-extraction; needs ontology review

label: Living tree stump / rootstock presence
comment: System-constraint precondition for FMNR (existing rootstock/regeneration capacity) — CRS FMNR Niger.
